zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth of Rhuddlan於1282年8月7日出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親Edward I King of England43歲，母親Eleanor of Castile Queen of England42歲。她於1297年1月8日與Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland在英國素福爾可易普斯維其結婚。她去世於1316年5月5日在英國艾可可登享年33歲，埋葬在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登瓦爾登 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth of Rhuddlan was born on 7 August 1282, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, Edward I King of England, was 43 and her mother, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, was 42. She married Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland on 8 January 1297, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England. She died on 5 May 1316, in Quendon, Essex, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth of Rhuddlan est née le 7 août 1282, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Edward I King of England, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland le 8 janvier 1297, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1316, à Quendon, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth of Rhuddlan am 7. August 1282 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward I King of England 43 und ihre Mutter Eleanor of Castile Queen of England 42. Sie hat am 8. Januar 1297 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland geheiratet. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1316 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Quendon, Essex, England und wurde in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth of Rhuddlan è nata il il 7 agosto 1282 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, sua padre, Edward I King of England, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland il 8 gennaio 1297, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England. Morì il 5 maggio 1316, nel Quendon, Essex, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth of Rhuddlanが1282年8月7日にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Edward I King of Englandは43歳，母Eleanor of Castile Queen of Englandは42歳であった。1297年1月8日にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチでJan I de Holland, Count of Hollandと結婚した。彼女は1316年5月5日にイギリスエセックスクエンドンで33歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンワルデン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth of Rhuddlan(이)가 1282년 8월 7일 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward I King of England(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor of Castile Queen of England(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1297년 1월 8일 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1316년 5월 5일 영국 에세스 크던에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth of Rhuddlan nasceu em 7 de agosto de 1282, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Edward I King of England, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland em 8 de janeiro de 1297, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 5 de maio de 1316, em Quendon, Essex, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth of Rhuddlan родилась 7 августа 1282 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Edward I King of England было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland 8 января 1297 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия. Она умерла 5 мая 1316 г. в местности куендон, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth of Rhuddlan nació el 7 de agosto de 1282, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Edward I King of England, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Eleanor of Castile Queen of England, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Jan I de Holland, Count of Holland el 8 de enero de 1297, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1316, en Quendon, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.
